data.title: Scalable Microservices
data.description: Instagram's backend is built on a microservices architecture that allows for independent deployment and scaling of services.
data.technical_spec: Deployed on AWS, utilizing Docker containers and Kubernetes for orchestration.

data.title: Database Design
data.description: Utilization of sharded MySQL and Redis for data storage, ensuring data redundancy and high availability.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Global CDN to deliver media content quickly to users around the world.
data.technical_spec: CloudFront integration for caching static assets.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Efficiently distributing incoming network traffic across multiple servers.
data.technical_spec: Elastic Load Balancers (ELB) managing incoming user requests.

data.title: GraphQL API
data.description: Leverages GraphQL for flexible and efficient client-server interactions.
data.technical_spec: Node.js and Apollo Server for API gateways.
